title: Wagheshwari Temple
tagline: Wagheshwari Temple — spiritual town of Maharashtra

overview.short: Wagheshwari Temple is one of the famous temples of Mumbai situated near Gokuldham Colony in Goregaon East.
overview.description: Wagheshwari Temple is one of the famous temples of Mumbai situated near Gokuldham Colony in Goregaon East. It is dedicated to Hindu Goddess Bhagwati. The deity is also known as Wagheshwari Mata who is supposed to be the Goddess Parvati in her form of Goddess Durga or an incarnation of Goddess Saraswati in her form of Vagdevi The entrance of the temple is decorated with huge sculptures of elephants. An important tradition in this temple is the sindoor ceremony where married women apply red powder on each other's foreheads.

topPlaces.name: Yashodham
topPlaces.description: Yashodham (Hindi: यशोधाम) is a densely populated locality in Mumbai, India, close to Goregaon railway station. It has around a hundred residential buildings ranging from 5 to 30 floors high and forthcoming constructions are expected to be higher.

topPlaces.name: Dindoshi metro station
topPlaces.description: Dindoshi is an elevated metro station on the North-South corridor of the Red Line 7 of Mumbai Metro in Mumbai, India. This metro station was inaugurated on 2 April 2022 by Prime Minister Narendra Modi.

topPlaces.name: Aarey metro station
topPlaces.description: Aarey is an elevated metro station on the North-South corridor of the Red Line 7 of Mumbai Metro in Mumbai, India. This metro station was inaugurated on 2 April 2022 by Prime Minister Narendra Modi.

topPlaces.name: Aarey Milk Colony
topPlaces.description: Aarey Milk Colony is within Sanjay Gandhi National Park (SGNP). Of which 25.6% (812 acres) are classified as mixed moist deciduous type forest.

topPlaces.name: Whistling Woods International
topPlaces.description: Whistling Woods International is a film, communication and creative arts institute located in Mumbai, India. Founded in 2006 by Subhash Ghai.

topPlaces.name: Kurar metro station
topPlaces.description: Kurar is an elevated metro station on the North-South corridor of the Red Line 7 of Mumbai Metro in Mumbai, India. This metro station was inaugurated on 2 April 2022 by Prime Minister Narendra Modi.

topPlaces.name: Film City, Mumbai
topPlaces.description: Film City, officially known as the Dadasaheb Phalke Chitranagari, is an integrated film studio complex located in Goregaon East, Mumbai. Established in 1977 by the Maharashtra State Government, it was created to provide facilities and concessions to the film industry.

topPlaces.name: Children's Academy
topPlaces.description: Children's Academy is a Mumbai-based chain of private co-educational English-medium day schools in Malad, Ashok Nagar and Kandivali in Mumbai; An IB board in Thane. The first school was founded in 1970 by Shri V.V. Bhat in Malad.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Wagheshwari Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Wagheshwari Temple is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Wagheshwari Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj International Airport, Mumbai (10 km) and the nearest railway station is Mumbai CSMT (26 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Wagheshwari Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Wagheshwari Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Wagheshwari Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Wagheshwari Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Wagheshwari Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Yashodham, Dindoshi metro station, Aarey metro station, Aarey Milk Colony, Whistling Woods International.
